options.name: --sourcePackagePath
options.description: The explicit path of a package to process (over-rides PackageId/Version) []

options.name: --packageId
options.description: The Package ID of the package to upload (from the HL7 FHIR Package Registry) []

options.name: --packageVersion
options.description: The version of the Package to upload (from the HL7 FHIR Package Registry) []

options.name: --forceDownload
options.description:
Force the download of the package from the source package path
(Useful if immediately running multiple times with `false` to use the last downloaded package) [default: True]

options.name: --fhirVersion
options.description:
Force the engine to a specific FHIR Version.
If the IG itself is a different version, then the tool will abort
Required if using a wildcard pattern to deploy a collection of raw resource files []

options.name: --resourceTypes
options.description: Which resource types should be processed by the uploader [default: StructureDefinition|ValueSet|CodeSystem|Questionnaire|SearchParameter|ConceptMap|StructureMap|Library]

options.name: --selectFiles
options.description:
Only process these selected files
(e.g. package/SearchParameter-valueset-extensions-ValueSet-end.json) []

options.name: --additionalPackages
options.description:
Set of additional packages to include in the processing
These will be processes as though they are dependencies of the root package []

options.name: --ignoreFiles
options.description: Any specific files that should be ignored/skipped when processing the package []

options.name: --ignoreCanonicals
options.description: Any specific Canonical URls that should be ignored/skipped when processing the package and resource dependencies []

options.name: --ignorePackages
options.description: While loading in dependencies, ignore these versioned packages. e.g. us.nlm.vsac|0.18.0 []

options.name: --destinationServerAddress
options.description: The URL of the FHIR Server to upload the package contents to []

options.name: --destinationServerHeaders
options.description: Headers to add to the request to the destination FHIR Server []

options.name: --destinationFormat
options.description: The format to upload to the destination server [default: xml]

options.name: --testPackageOnly
options.description:
Only perform download and static analysis checks on the Package.
Does not require a DestinationServerAddress, will not try to connect to one if provided [default: False]

options.name: --REMOVE_ALL
options.description:
Remove all selected package content from the destination server.
Intended to 'un-install' a package from a server, or to clean up a server before deploying a new version of a package.
Use with extreme caution as this will permanently remove resources from the destination server [default: False]

options.name: --validateQuestionnaires
options.description: Include more extensive testing on Questionnaires (experimental) [default: False]

options.name: --validateReferencedDependencies
options.description: Validate any referenced resources from dependencies being installed [default: False]

options.name: --preventDuplicateCanonicalVersions
options.description:
Permit the tool to upload canonical resources even if they would result in the server having multiple canonical versions of the same resource after it runs
The requires the server to be able to handle resolving canonical URLs to the correct version of the resource desired by a particular call. Either via the versioned canonical reference, or using the logic defined in the $current-canonical operation [default: True]

options.name: --deleteDuplicateCanonicalVersions
options.description:
Delete any other canonical versions of a resource found on the server before uploading the new version
Use with caution as this will permanently remove resources from the destination server [default: False]

options.name: --checkAndCleanNarratives
options.description:
Check and clean any narratives in the package and remove suspect ones
(based on the MS FHIR Server's rules) [default: False]

options.name: --stripNarratives
options.description: Strip all narratives from the resources in the package [default: False]

options.name: --checkPackageInstallationStateOnly
options.description:
Download and check the package and compare with the contents of the FHIR Server,
but do not update any of the contents of the FHIR Server [default: False]

options.name: --generateSnapshots
options.description: Generate the snapshots for any missing snapshots in StructureDefinitions [default: False]

options.name: --regenerateSnapshots
options.description: Re-Generate all snapshots in StructureDefinitions [default: False]

options.name: --removeSnapshots
options.description: Remove all snapshots in StructureDefinitions [default: False]

options.name: --patchCanonicalVersions
options.description: Patch canonical URL references to be version specific if they resolve within the package [default: False]

options.name: --includeReferencedDependencies
options.description: Upload any referenced resources from resource dependencies being included [default: False]

options.name: --includeExamples
options.description:
Also include files in the examples sub-directory
(Still needs resource type specified) [default: False]

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Provide verbose diagnostic output while processing
(e.g. Filenames processed) [default: False]

options.name: --outputBundle
options.description: The filename to write a json batch bundle containing all of the processed resources into (could be used in place of directly deploying the IG) []

options.name: --outputDependenciesFile
options.description: Write the list of dependencies discovered in the IG into a json file for post-processing []

options.name: --externalRegistry
options.description: The URL of an external FHIR server to use for resolving resources not already on the destination server []

options.name: --externalRegistryHeaders
options.description: Additional headers to supply when connecting to the external FHIR server []

options.name: --externalRegistryExportFile
options.description: The filename of a file to write the json bundle of downloaded registry resources to []

options.name: --externalTerminologyServer
options.description: The URL of an external FHIR terminology server to use for creating expansions (where not on an external registry) []

options.name: --externalTerminologyServerHeaders
options.description: Additional headers to supply when connecting to the external FHIR terminology server []

options.name: --maxExpansionSize
options.description: The maximum number of codes to include in a ValueSet expansion [default: 1000]

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
